blocks.text: Arsenal in the semis — now it's City at the Etihad on Sunday
Arteta's side held Sporting 0-0 to seal a CL semifinal spot — 6 points clear of City in the PL. Sunday's trip to the Etihad is suddenly everything.
🎮 Ongoing — IEM Rio 2026: rain (Håvard Nygaard) in the CS2 Major field in Rio
